key_points: Oswald Hall has large study rooms praised by students
Dorm rooms are small but functional with lofted beds
Limited firsthand complaints suggest housing is acceptable baseline
key_quotes: Nice big study rooms.
I don't know if I missed it, but how do you get up on the bed?? It looks way too high

key_points: Basketball culture dominates social identity — Allen Fieldhouse is central
Strong sports fan community; baseball, volleyball, soccer also rising
Transfer portal churn has eroded connection students feel to players
key_quotes: There is no greater place to go to school. There is no greater place to watch a basketball game.
The college charm is long gone. We are left with a revolving door of rent-a-players.
Watching guys develop and turn into studs is half the fun.

key_points: No meaningful dining data appears across any source
Campus food quality is essentially unmentioned by students
Cannot score positively or negatively without student feedback
key_quotes: No direct quotes available from any source.

key_points: One student mentions discovering passion after leaving KU — suggests some drift
No dedicated mental health support resources mentioned by students
A student described feeling unmotivated and directionless at KU
key_quotes: I used to be so motivated in high school... I ended up going to my backup school, the University of Kansas, when every single other college I applied to denied or waitlisted me.
I'm on the verge of having a breakdown.
I used to go to university of Kansas, raised my 3.0 to a 3.5, then switched... I realized how passionate about Psychology I am.

key_points: KU gives only $1k/year for National Merit Finalists — far below competitors
Out-of-state tuition around $28k/year, in-state ~$12k — seen as affordable
SELF Fellowship in engineering praised as a strong opportunity
key_quotes: KU only gives $1k per year for being NMF. Meanwhile, Bama covers tuition for 10 semesters.
I got an offer for $9000 a year for four years in University of Kansas to study CS.
I got accepted to the SELF fellowship program at their college of engineering.

key_points: Engineering internship pipeline is reportedly strong per faculty claims
CS program ranked outside top 100 nationally — not a tech powerhouse
Honors program exists but students unsure if it's worth the extra work
key_quotes: A professor directly told me that most anyone in engineering at KU can land a paid internship.
I was just admitted to the KU Honors Program! Has anyone else been admitted on here? People who went through this program — is it worth it?
I suppose I was either a waste of space or a person who discovered it was a joke to get a degree.

key_points: App fee payment portal caused anxiety for international students with no confirmation
NIL and transfer portal management criticized as disorganized under Self
David Booth's $300M donation shows admin has elite donor relationships
key_quotes: He refuses to allow Goff to hire a GM. He refuses to hire an offensive coordinator style assistant coach.
I paid it with the link on my applicant portal. It's been 4 days yet my applicant portal shows 'awaited' on the application fee status. I'm scared.
Camp Lottery Rigging (finally) exposed... This has been going on at least since the Phog Phanatics cheated all the time back in the early 2000s.

key_points: Lawrence is a beloved college town with strong local identity
New David Booth Stadium is visually stunning and generating buzz
Allen Fieldhouse described repeatedly as one of the best venues in sports
key_quotes: The most sacred grounds in all of sports, the Taj Mahal of Basketball.
Great photo. This really showcases the architecture concept of the golden wheat in the new stadium design.
To be a student at KU is like nowhere else.

key_points: Engineering students report strong paid internship placement per faculty
Notable alumni in NBA, entertainment (Don Johnson), and business
KU not mentioned as a target school for competitive tech or finance jobs
key_quotes: A professor directly told me that most anyone in engineering at KU can land a paid internship.
You are equally likely to get selected whether your undergrad was at T20 or University of Kansas — per NASA astronaut data.
Christian Braun signs 5-year, $125 million extension with Nuggets.

key_points: In-state at ~$12k/year is consistently flagged as genuinely affordable
Out-of-state sticker price competitive but NMF merit aid is weak
Strong athletic investment via Booth donations doesn't directly help students financially
key_quotes: Currently my cheapest option is University of Kansas, which is 12k per year.
KU only gives $1k per year for being NMF. Meanwhile, Bama covers tuition for 10 semesters.
I can afford it with minor loans.

key_points: Basketball is the soul of campus — non-fans may feel left out
Strong school pride and tradition; 'Rock Chalk' identity is deeply felt
NIL era frustration is real but hasn't killed fan passion yet
key_quotes: There's no greater place to watch a basketball game. Rock Chalk.
I'm done. See you next fall when I am learning names and numbers again.
I wasn't a KU fan before I arrived at campus in 2005, so he's the only KU coach I've ever known in 20 years of diehard fandom.

key_points: **Merit Aid:** NMF scholarship is only $1k/year — one of the worst in the country
**Academics:** CS rejected a 31 ACT/3.0 GPA student; admissions inconsistency noted
**Administration:** Student camp lottery rigging exposed, reportedly ongoing since early 2000s
key_quotes: Just got denied from CompSci at University of Kansas... I only applied to have a fallback plan.
This has been going on at least since the Phog Phanatics cheated all the time back in the early 2000s. Glad they caught this one though.
KU only gives $1k per year for being NMF. Meanwhile, Bama covers tuition for 10 semesters.

key_points: SELF Engineering Fellowship is a well-regarded and underrated opportunity
Baseball program is a surprise powerhouse — Big 12 champs, Super Regional host
Allen Fieldhouse student experience rivals any venue in college sports
key_quotes: I got accepted to the SELF fellowship program at their college of engineering.
45 wins. 3 championships. 2 postseason weekends in Lawrence.
I went to almost every game when I was a student there, and it still gives me chills watching that.
